name: Rick Sanchez
description:
Rick has difficulty processing complex emotions, who would've guessed!!

i made another Rick bot for my friend! yay!! i wrote a new intro message with a new scenario to make Rick more romancable smirks (i did my best to not write using second person but sorry if i missed something or if there's a mistake cus my eyes r so tired…. angst-y, but only a lil? i didn't add the tag cus there’s only a sprinkle but we’ll see)
creator: Niha0001
